Alright, we're rocking and rolling. So this is the weigh-in day, orientation day. If you guys want to save, anybody want to save 50 bucks? Okay, cool. So if you're someone who's on a three-pay plan, if you just paid off today for 147, we'll save you 50 bucks because listen, like, the last thing we want to do is chase people down for payments. And so this just makes our life easier so you save us time so we save you money. Win-win, right? That's exactly how we script it. Most people are like, sure, cool. And sell the gap. So you don't want to sell, don't sell like, hey guys, instead of paying $300, you're going to pay 250. Just say, hey, some of you guys are on three-pay. Instead of paying 200, you can pay 150 or 147 a day if you don't feel like splitting it up. Sound good? Most people when they hear the difference are like, yeah, sure, I'll save 50 bucks. And then that way you can collect as much money up front as possible, which allows you to liquidate acquisition costs. Meaning if you're paying for ads on Facebook or paying for ads on any traffic platform, you can recoup as much of that money as possible on the front end so that you can actually make money in the acquisition and then everything after that is just profit. And just be like, hey guys, listen between now and the end of the program, you have absolutely like you can let us know the last day that you don't want to continue.
